Name: GAME_AREA_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the soul and humanity drops given upon boss victories.

Fields.Name: Soul Amount: Singleplayer Clear
Fields.Description: The amount of souls gained when defeating the associated boss in singleplayer.

Fields.Name: Soul Amount: Multiplayer Clear
Fields.Description: The amount of souls gained when defeating the associated boss in multiplayer.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Count: Flag ID
Fields.Description: The event flag ID used to hold humanity drop point count. Consumes 20 bits (e.g. this flag plus the next 19)

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 1
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 1 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 2
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 2 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 3
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 3 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 4
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 4 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 5
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 5 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 6
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 6 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 7
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 7 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 8
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 8 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 9
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 9 humanity.

Fields.Name: Humanity Drop Point Threshold: 10
Fields.Description: The point threshold for acquiring 10 humanity.
